pages.title: The Alumni App
pages.rawHtml:
Still stuck on an Alumni Website?
It's time to go the APP way.

  • Home
  • Features
  • Demo
  • FAQs
  • Contact Us

TIME TO GO

THE APP WAY


Being an Alumni Relations Company, we understand what strengthens the bond between alumni and their institution.

Launch the Alumni App to build & nourish your alumni community.

Customize your Identity

With the Alumni App, you get an opportunity to customize the app with your school and alumni network’s identity and brand. Connect and engage your alumni network on your own private Mobile App - your own school’s colors, images and much more. You can manage and moderate everything through your Admin Panel.

Real Time Data

We’re here to solve your biggest problem - gathering real-time personal and professional details of your alumni. You can now communicate and engage with your community through one central App - no need to post on multiple social-media channels.

Relevant Content

The app offers you one-touch options to share photos, articles, events, newsletters and much more. You can create hash-tags according to the nature of the post, making it easier to consume content based on one’s interest, industry or need.

  • Posts
  • Alumni
  • Chat
  • Events
  • Fund-Raising
  • Dashboard

Use Hashtags

Share relevant Content - photos, articles, questions, using hashtags (#)

Search

Alumni and School can search posts for desired topics and hashtags

Engage

Alumni can Like and Comment on posts and Tag their friends

Share

Share posts through Facebook, Twitter or LinkedIn

Search

Search alumni by Name, Class and Location

Use Filters

Combine filters to search alumni based on Industry, Organisation or University

Nearby Alumni

Sort alumni based on their location

Discover

See complete details of Alumni and their Activity on the App

Easy to Create

Create events with a single tap

Invite

Share pictures and relevant details of the event and invite alumni on the App

View RSVP

View details of alumni who are going to the Event (RSVP)

Discuss

Engage in conversations about the event in the comments section

Say Hi!

Invite people to chat using the "Say Hi!" feature

Security

View profile or block people from chat itself

Media

Send photos in chats

Group Chat

Make a group to chat with your friends

Campaigns

Create valuable fundraising campaigns for school, alumni, students with pictures, text and links

Progress

Check the status bar of a funding campaign (%age raised)

Payments

1-Click Payment through the 'Contribute Now' button

Donors

See a list of donors for each fund

Manage and Verify

Manage and verify alumni users on the App using the Web-Dashboard

Create Content

Manage and Create Content, Events and Fundraisers

Track Activity

Track alumni activity on the App using powerful analytics tools

Push Notifications

Send direct Messages (Push notifications) to Alumni with 1-Click

Launch your App in 3 Easy Steps

Step 1

Request for a demo of the ‘Alumni App’

Step 2

Provide your requirements & we will customize it as per your needs

Step 3

Launch it in less than 14 days

Getting Started

Download the Demo App

The Alumni App is a product of FuturEd. All Rights reserved

pages.text:
## Still stuck on an Alumni Website?  It's time to go the APP way.

[![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/logo-bar.png)](http://thealumniapp.com/)

- [Home](http://thealumniapp.com/index.php#home)
- [Features](http://thealumniapp.com/index.php#features)
- [Demo](http://thealumniapp.com/demo.php)
- [FAQs](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs.php)
- [Contact Us](http://thealumniapp.com/contact.php)

![The Alumni App UI](http://thealumniapp.com/images/app-ui.png)

### TIME TO GO

# THE APP WAY

Being an Alumni Relations Company, we understand what strengthens the bond between alumni and their institution.

Launch the Alumni App to build & nourish your alumni community.

[Getting Started](http://thealumniapp.com/index.php#features)

![Step 1](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-1.png)

#### Customize your Identity

With the Alumni App, you get an opportunity to customize the app with your school and alumni network’s identity and brand. Connect and engage your alumni network on your own private Mobile App - your own school’s colors, images and much more. You can manage and moderate everything through your Admin Panel.

![Step 2](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-2.png)

#### Real Time Data

We’re here to solve your biggest problem - gathering real-time personal and professional details of your alumni. You can now communicate and engage with your community through one central App - no need to post on multiple social-media channels.

![Step 3](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-3.png)

#### Relevant Content

The app offers you one-touch options to share photos, articles, events, newsletters and much more. You can create hash-tags according to the nature of the post, making it easier to consume content based on one’s interest, industry or need.

- ![posts](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-home.png)Posts
- ![Alumni](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-alumni.png)Alumni
- ![Chat](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-chat.png)Chat
- ![Events](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-events.png)Events
- ![Fund-Raising](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-funds.png)Fund-Raising
- ![Dashboard](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icon-dash.png)Dashboard

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/H-1.png)

### Use Hashtags

Share relevant Content - photos, articles, questions, using hashtags (#)

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/H-2.png)

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/H-4.png)

### Use Filters

Combine filters to search alumni based on Industry, Organisation or University

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/S-3.png)

Share pictures and relevant details of the event and invite alumni on the App

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/F-1.png)

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/F-2.png)

### Progress

![feature](http://thealumniapp.com/images/fundraising/fund1.png)

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/F-3.png)

### Payments

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/F-4.png)

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/D-1.png)

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/D-2.png)

### Create Content

![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/icons/D-3.png)

pages.title: FAQs | The Alumni App
pages.rawHtml:
• Home
  • Features
  • Demo
  • FAQs
  • Contact Us

FAQs

General

Why a mobile app over a web portal?

Mobile is the futuristic way to stay connected and engage effectively with audiences. People are consuming gigabytes of data on their mobile phones and spend majority of time building connections over mobile as compared to web platforms.
Going mobile is staying ahead for the next 10 years and sticking to the web is staying 10 years behind.

In how much time can you launch the app for my institution?

Once you have taken the visionary step of connecting and engaging with your Alumni effectively, we do all the necessary ground work and get you live in 14 days.

What are the benefits of this app for my institution?

  • You can track and connect Alumni of your institution in the fastest possible manner.
  • You can keep Alumni updated with the progress of your institution.
  • Alumni can create events, share news with each other and the institution using hashtags making it easier to search relevant content.
  • You can also launch scholarship and fundraising campaigns through the App’s Content Rich features.

Will the app work internationally?

Your app just needs a working Wi-Fi connection or internet service from the mobile provider. Once that is in place, you are ready to reconnect with your alumni.

What will be the name of the app?

The app is for your alumni network so it will be customised as per your choice.

How much would this app cost for my institution?

We understand your need for validating if the product you want to deploy works well for you or not, so we get you started with a two month trial! Upon launching the App, we work on an annual subscription basis.

Admin

How will the institution moderate data on the app?

We know no one likes spam so we have provided an admin panel which can be used as a dashboard by the admin.

What kind of functions can the admin perform?

From the biggest super power of approving/rejecting any person to modifying user generated content such as news, events, etc, the admin panel has it all.

What kind of data analytics is available?

  • You can see what type of content brings you more likes and comments
  • Daily activity of a user
  • When are maximum users logging on the app

Functionality

On what platforms is the app available?

Keeping in mind the most popular platforms in the market, the app would be available on Android and iOS.

Who generates content for the app?

To build a thriving alumni network on your app, content needs to come from both, institution and alumni themselves. We do provide support by advising what works best with alumni.

How fast do you respond to issues?

We try to be Supermen/women and won’t keep you waiting for more than 24 hours!

Security

Who can access the mobile application?

We pride ourselves on providing a closed network for your institution so only verified alumni, students and faculty of your institution can log in to the app.

How will alumni data be verified?

Using your existing database along with our expertise in tracking alumni through social media, we will put a verification mechanism suitable to your needs.

Where is the data hosted?

Alumni data is extremely critical which is why we chose trusted web-hosting platforms and servers.

Do you share data with LinkedIn or any other third party?

No. We understand the importance of your data and the data is bound by confidentiality.

The Alumni App is a product of FuturEd. All Rights reserved
pages.text:
[![](http://thealumniapp.com/images/logo-bar.png)](http://thealumniapp.com/)

- [Home](http://thealumniapp.com/index.php)
- [Features](http://thealumniapp.com/index.php#features)
- [Demo](http://thealumniapp.com/demo.php)
- [FAQs](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs.php)
- [Contact Us](http://thealumniapp.com/contact.php)

# FAQs

GeneralAdminFunctionalitySecurity

## General

#### [Why a mobile app over a web portal?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsegeneral1)

Mobile is the **futuristic** way to stay **connected** and **engage** effectively with audiences. People are consuming gigabytes of data on their mobile phones and spend majority of time **building connections** over mobile as compared to web platforms.

Going mobile is **staying ahead** for the next 10 years and sticking to the web is staying 10 years behind.

#### [In how much time can you launch the app for my institution?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsegeneral2)

Once you have taken the visionary step of connecting and engaging with your Alumni effectively, we do all the necessary ground work and get you **live in 14 days.**

#### [What are the benefits of this app for my institution?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsegeneral3)

- You can **track and connect** Alumni of your institution in the fastest possible manner.

- You can keep Alumni **updated** with the progress of your institution.

- Alumni can **create events, share news** with each other and the institution using hashtags making it easier to search relevant content.

- You can also launch **scholarship** and **fundraising campaigns** through the App’s Content Rich features.


#### [Will the app work internationally?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsegeneral4)

Your app just needs a working **Wi-Fi** connection or **internet** service from the mobile provider. Once that is in place, you are ready to reconnect with your alumni.

#### [What will be the name of the app?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsegeneral5)

The app is for your alumni network so it will be **customised** as per your choice.

#### [How much would this app cost for my institution?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsegeneral6)

We understand your need for validating if the product you want to deploy works well for you or not, so we get you started with a **two month trial!** Upon launching the App, we work on an **annual subscription** basis.

## Admin

#### [How will the institution moderate data on the app?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapseadmin1)

We know no one likes spam so we have provided an **admin panel** which can be used as a **dashboard** by the admin.

#### [What kind of functions can the admin perform?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapseadmin2)

From the biggest super power of **approving/rejecting** any person to **modifying** user generated content such as **news, events, etc,** the admin panel has it all.

#### [What kind of data analytics is available?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapseadmin3)

- You can see what type of content brings you more **likes and comments**
- Daily **activity** of a user

- When are **maximum users** logging on the app


## Functionality

#### [On what platforms is the app available?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsefuntionality1)

Keeping in mind the most popular platforms in the market, the app would be available on **Android** and **iOS.**

#### [Who generates content for the app?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsefuntionality2)

To build a thriving alumni network on your app, content needs to come from both, **institution and alumni** themselves. We do provide support by advising what works best with alumni.

#### [How fast do you respond to issues?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsefuntionality3)

We try to be Supermen/women and won’t keep you waiting for more than **24 hours!**

## Security

#### [Who can access the mobile application?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsesecurity1)

We pride ourselves on providing a closed network for your institution so only **verified alumni, students** and **faculty** of your institution can log in to the app.

#### [How will alumni data be verified?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsesecurity2)

Using your existing database along with our expertise in tracking alumni through social media, we will put a verification mechanism suitable to your needs.

#### [Where is the data hosted?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsesecurity3)

Alumni data is extremely critical which is why we chose trusted **web-hosting platforms** and **servers.**

#### [Do you share data with LinkedIn or any other third party?](http://thealumniapp.com/faqs-text.php\#collapsesecurity4)

No. We understand the importance of your data and the data is bound by confidentiality.
